notes: Value-delivery fix (#516): the daily verdict had been dark since 2026-03-16. pipeline_runs (owner 2cbc1bab, 45d) showed 77 generation_failed_sentinel days, ~45 real candidates found per run, and the positive_winner_contract gate blocking the winner 96% of the time (74/77) with error_class null (mis-calibration, not a crash). Root cause: hunt-finding -> candidate builder dropped the source date. lib/briefing/scorer.ts:huntFindingToScoredLoop built sourceSignals as {kind,id,summary} with no occurredAt, and HuntFinding (lib/briefing/hunt-anomalies.ts) had no date field, so newestSourceDate() returned null and the currentness/anchor gates (missing_current_artifact_anchor, stale_status_without_current_artifact_facts) executed every hunt winner (the calendar-gap / unanswered-email / repeat-sender cards that dominated the suppressed list). Fix grounds, does not loosen (per docs/CONTEXT.md): HuntFinding.newestSignalAt added + populated from each finding's newest supporting signal occurred_at; propagated to sourceSignals[].occurredAt. Fresh real anomalies now ship; genuinely stale (>14d) ones are still caught by the existing stale_evidence_over_14d blocker. Proven: new hunt-grounding-516 suite (undated->blocked, dated->ships, 30d->still blocked) + full briefing suite (827) green; one pipeline-receipt assertion updated (90d email now blocked as stale_evidence_over_14d, a more accurate reason, still do_nothing/no-spend). Predecessors merged: Drive backfill #514 (PR #515), identity #511 (PRs #512/#513), #507 (PR #508).
